'''βàön-sh-m-g''' ('''kanashmegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:centrifugalize|centrifugalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-m-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:centrifugalize|centrifugalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàön-sh-m-g
|-
! Lemma
| kanashmegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinashmegoko|thinashmegoko]] || [[word:jinashmegoko|jinashmegoko]] || [[word:shinashmegoko|shinashmegoko]] || [[word:kinashmegoko|kinashmegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunashmegoko|thuthunashmegoko]] || [[word:jujunashmegoko|jujunashmegoko]] || [[word:shushunashmegoko|shushunashmegoko]] || [[word:kukunashmegoko|kukunashmegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunashmegoko|thunashmegoko]] || [[word:junashmegoko|junashmegoko]] || [[word:shunashmegoko|shunashmegoko]] || [[word:kunashmegoko|kunashmegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunashmegoko|thunashmegoko]] || [[word:junashmegoko|junashmegoko]] || [[word:shunashmegoko|shunashmegoko]] || [[word:kunashmegoko|kunashmegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonashmegoko|thonashmegoko]] || [[word:jonashmegoko|jonashmegoko]] || [[word:shonashmegoko|shonashmegoko]] || [[word:konashmegoko|konashmegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠnashmegoko|thΟΠnashmegoko]] || [[word:jΟΠnashmegoko|jΟΠnashmegoko]] || [[word:shΟΠnashmegoko|shΟΠnashmegoko]] || [[word:kΟΠnashmegoko|kΟΠnashmegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
